entries.query: Should I use pgvector or Qdrant for my RAG system?
entries.expected_recommendation_direction: pgvector if already on PostgreSQL; Qdrant for dedicated vector search at scale

entries.query: LangGraph or PydanticAI for our new agent system?
entries.expected_recommendation_direction: LangGraph for complex multi-agent orchestration; PydanticAI for typed single-agent workflows

entries.query: Should we migrate from Jenkins to GitHub Actions?
entries.expected_recommendation_direction: GitHub Actions when repo is on GitHub and pipelines are moderate; Jenkins for heavy customization or hybrid infra

entries.query: Redis or Valkey — what are the real trade-offs in 2026?
entries.expected_recommendation_direction: Valkey as open-source Redis fork for licensing clarity; Redis for managed ecosystem and enterprise support

entries.query: When should we split our monolith into microservices?
entries.expected_recommendation_direction: Keep monolith until team or deployment boundaries justify extraction; microservices for independent scaling teams

entries.query: REST or GraphQL for our public API?
entries.expected_recommendation_direction: REST for simple resource APIs and caching; GraphQL when clients need flexible field selection

entries.query: Kafka vs RabbitMQ for our event-driven architecture?
entries.expected_recommendation_direction: Kafka for high-throughput event streaming and replay; RabbitMQ for task queues and routing flexibility

entries.query: Terraform or Pulumi for infrastructure as code?
entries.expected_recommendation_direction: Terraform for ecosystem maturity and HCL standardization; Pulumi for typed IaC in existing languages

entries.query: Docker Swarm or Kubernetes for container orchestration?
entries.expected_recommendation_direction: Kubernetes for production scale and ecosystem; Swarm only for minimal ops on small clusters

entries.query: SQLite or PostgreSQL for edge deployments?
entries.expected_recommendation_direction: SQLite for embedded single-node edge; PostgreSQL when replication or concurrent writers matter

entries.query: Should I use Redis or Memcached for session storage?
entries.expected_recommendation_direction: Redis for richer data structures and persistence options; Memcached for pure ephemeral cache simplicity
